title: [Renseikai] Add Student Filter (Lesson Detail) – Student Classification – Filter Presence – Filter appears below Type filter
description: AC 02.4 — CRUD Testing — Confirms the Student Classification filter is present in the Add Student popup in Lesson Detail, positioned directly below the Type filter.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. A lesson exists that allows adding students. The Add Student popup is accessible from Lesson Detail.
steps_actions:
1. "Navigate to the Lesson Detail page from the Lesson Calendar"
2. "Click Add Student to open the student search popup"
3. "Observe the filter fields in the popup"
4. "Identify the position of the Student Classification filter"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson Detail page opens"
2. "Add Student popup opens"
3. "Filter fields are visible"
4. "The Student Classification multi-select filter appears directly below the Type filter"

title: [Renseikai] Add Student Filter (Lesson Detail) – Student Classification – Default State – All students returned when no classification selected
description: AC 02.4 — Decision Table — Confirms that with no classification selected in the Add Student filter, all students of all types are returned.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. Students of all classification types exist: 在籍生, 元在籍生, 問合生, 季節講習生, and null. Add Student popup open from Lesson Detail.
steps_actions:
1. "Open the Add Student popup from Lesson Detail"
2. "Confirm the Student Classification filter has no value selected"
3. "Click Search"
steps_result:
1. "Popup opens with all filter fields empty"
2. "Student Classification filter is empty"
3. "Student list returns students of all classification types (在籍生, 元在籍生, 問合生, 季節講習生, null)"

title: [Renseikai] Add Student Filter (Lesson Detail) – Student Classification – Single Value Selected – Only matching students returned
description: AC 02.4 — Decision Table, Equivalence Partitioning — Confirms that selecting one classification value returns only students with that classification.
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. Students with 季節講習生 and 在籍生 exist. Add Student popup open from Lesson Detail.
steps_actions:
1. "Open the Add Student popup from Lesson Detail"
2. "Select 季節講習生 in the Student Classification filter"
3. "Click Search"
steps_result:
1. "Popup opens"
2. "季節講習生 is selected"
3. "Student list shows only students with Student Classification = 季節講習生"

title: [Renseikai] Add Student Filter (Lesson Detail) – Student Classification – Two Values Selected – OR logic returns students of both types
description: AC 02.4 — Decision Table — Confirms that selecting two classification values returns students matching either value (OR logic).
preconditions: PBT-2485 deployed in Renseikai org. Logged in as HQ or CM Staff to the Salesforce org. Students with 在籍生, 季節講習生, and 問合生 exist. Add Student popup open from Lesson Detail.
steps_actions:
1. "Open the Add Student popup from Lesson Detail"
2. "Select 在籍生 in the Student Classification filter"
3. "Also select 季節講習生 in the same filter"
4. "Click Search"
steps_result:
1. "Popup opens"
2. "在籍生 is selected"
3. "Both 在籍生 and 季節講習生 are shown as selected"
4. "Student list includes students with 在籍生 AND students with 季節講習生; students with 問合生 or 元在籍生 are not shown"
